description_long: This is a stylized, military-inspired helmet with a robust, angular design and a prominent gold star emblem on the front. The helmet features a thick, dark outer rim that frames a lighter, slightly textured central dome, suggesting a layered construction for added protection. The sides are reinforced with pronounced, geometric panels that extend toward the back, giving the helmet a sturdy and protective appearance. The top of the helmet is mostly flat with two symmetrical, dark ridges that add visual interest and structural strength. The gold star on the front is the only decorative element, standing out against the otherwise monochrome color scheme. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or authoritative function, likely intended for a figure of rank or distinction.
description: A robust, angular military-style helmet with a gold star emblem on the front and a thick, dark rim framing a lighter dome. The design is sturdy and authoritative, with reinforced sides and minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold star emblem centered on the light dome, framed by the thick, dark rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular, reinforced panels and the layered construction of the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat top and symmetrical dark ridges, with the helmet's protective back curvature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the reinforced panels and showing the helmet's overall thickness.
